description_long: This object is a tall, slender street light with a simple, utilitarian design commonly found in urban environments. The pole is straight, cylindrical, and dark-colored, anchored by a slightly wider base for stability. At the top, a single, gently curved arm extends outward, supporting a streamlined, oval-shaped lamp head. The lamp head is modern in style, with a smooth, metallic finish and no visible decorative elements, likely housing an LED or similar light source. The overall construction appears robust, designed to withstand outdoor conditions and provide efficient illumination over streets or sidewalks. There are no visible access panels, switches, or additional fixtures attached to the pole.
description: A tall, modern street light with a straight dark pole and a single curved arm supporting a sleek, oval lamp head. The design is minimal and functional, suitable for urban streets or sidewalks.
description_view_0: The street light is seen from the side, clearly showing the curved arm and oval lamp head extending from the top of the pole.
description_view_1: A direct end-on view of the pole, making the lamp head appear as a small circle and the pole as a thin vertical line.
description_view_2: Another side view, mirroring view 0, with the curved arm and lamp head visible from the opposite direction.
description_view_3: A rear end-on view, similar to view 1, with the lamp head and pole aligned, showing minimal width.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, streamlined oval lamp head with a smooth metallic finish and no decorative elements or visible diffusers.
